productDisplayName: French Connection Women Orange Sling Bag
description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Orange handbag Has a flap with a twist lock closure Has a separator and a zipped pocket Has an adjustable shoulder strap Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 13 cm Width: 19 cm Depth: 10 cm Style NoteThis season's French Connection line features bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style.
